ValidationRule.description: Rule fires if document link is changed by a user who is not on Commercial or System Admin profile. Used to enforce FLS when Document Link updated via screen flow.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( pro_Long_Document_Link__c ), NOT($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), NOT($Profile.Name = "Carlyle Commercial") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Your user does not have permission to update the Document Link field.
